market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Tucked near the historic town of Otley, this inviting cottage offers a warm escape for up to 4 guests. The spacious interiors balance rustic charm with modern comfort, featuring [describe layout, e.g. lounge with [specific feature], and [kitchen amenities if available]]. Outside, visitors will appreciate [mention views/landscaping/adjacent space if known]. Ideal for couples, families, or friends seeking a relaxed retreat, the property ensures convenience without compromising character. With 25 nights upcoming where this home is available in the next 90 days, book early to secure your stay at £150 per night.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize the cottage's exterior as the cover photo to showcase curb appeal immediately—this is most important for first impressions on mobile searches.
key_diagnosis: Title lacks differentiators (current 4.92 rating but no specific selling points in title vs 201 competitors in area)
Amenities score 2/10 - no amenities listed despite market data showing 'Outdoors' and 'Parking' as top booking drivers
Photos score 3/10 - no room type labels provided to verify visual appeal or layout clarity
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing has 25 open nights at £150/night in the next 90 days, but currently lists no amenities—adding 2-3 high-value items like parking or outdoor space could make these dates bookable faster.
